heading: Printing and distribution of reports and machine-readable records
label: 6203 Printing and distribution of reports and machine-readable records
notes: Amendments1996—Subsec. (a)(3). substituted “House Oversight” for “House Administration”.Pub. L. 104–186

children.label: i
children.text: printed copies of each of the reports required by this chapter; and

children.label: ii
children.text: machine-readable records of such reports; and

children.label: B
children.text: make the printed copies of the reports and the machine-readable records available to the public for purchase at a price fixed under subsection (b).

children.label: B
children.text: the Committees on Government Operations, the Budget, and Appropriations of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Committees on Governmental Affairs, the Budget, and Appropriations of the Senate.

The Director shall also transmit promptly after the end of each calendar year, free of charge, one machine-readable record of the report required by section 6202 to the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate and to the Committee on House Oversight of the House of Representatives.
Subject to subsection (b), the Director may, at his discretion, waive all or part of the fee required by subsection (a)(1)(B) of this section.

the cost of compiling the reports required by this chapter; preparing the printed copies and machine-readable records under subsection (a); and distributing the printed copies and the machine-readable records of the report for each fiscal year; and
the number of printed copies and the number of machine-readable records of the report that will be purchased.
